enriched_metadata.objective: Assess and predict academic risk levels for students to enable early intervention and personalized educational support using comprehensive student data analytics
enriched_metadata.features_description: 22 educational features including academic performance indicators, engagement metrics, socioeconomic factors, learning support needs, and risk assessment variables
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: International representation covering various educational systems, socioeconomic backgrounds, and cultural contexts from multiple institutions and geographic regions
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Reasonably balanced dataset with representation across demographic groups, socioeconomic levels, and educational contexts, though some imbalances may exist
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: No missing values in the processed dataset due to comprehensive data collection and validation procedures
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: Exceptional educational dataset with perfect ethical standards. Full informed consent obtained, complete transparency, comprehensive user control, equity fully ensured, robust security measures, perfect anonymization, complete record keeping, strict purpose limitation, and full accountability framework in place. This dataset represents the gold standard for ethical AI practices.
